description_long: This lamp features a simple cylindrical form with a matte white exterior, adorned with abstract yellow line art that appears hand-drawn. The lines create a minimalistic, artistic pattern that wraps partially around the surface, giving the lamp a modern and decorative appeal. The top is flat and open, suggesting that light would emit from the upper surface, typical of an uplight or ambient lamp. The body is seamless and smooth, with no visible seams, switches, or hardware, emphasizing a clean and contemporary design. The lamp's size and proportions suggest it is intended for tabletop or small area use, likely providing soft, diffused illumination. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with the yellow line art serving as the primary decorative feature.
description: A matte white cylindrical lamp with abstract yellow line art, featuring a flat open top and a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main yellow abstract line art pattern on the white cylindrical surface.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the continuation of the yellow lines, with most of the surface remaining plain white.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain white surface with no visible decoration or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the edge of the yellow line art, with most of the surface still white.
